match.userMessage:
Analyze the script within the USER_SCRIPT tags and split it into logical scenes using the aspect ratio specified in the ASPECT_RATIO tags. Also extract a complete character bible, location bible, and element bible.

<ASPECT_RATIO>
16:9
</ASPECT_RATIO>

<ELEMENTS>
The following user-uploaded elements are available. Track each one's UPPERCASE token in the script and populate elementBible + continuity.elementTags accordingly:
(none)
</ELEMENTS>

<USER_SCRIPT>
FADE IN:

INT. MODERN NEWSROOM - GOLDEN HOUR TWILIGHT - WIDE 16:9 CINEMATIC

Bright natural window light floods the airy space, crisp whites (#FFFFFF) and warm beiges (#F0E6D3) on sleek desks. Rain streaks the vast glass wall like tactile ink veins. A REPORTER (30s, effortlessly cool, pink blouse #D4536D pop against neutral skin tones) types furiously at a glowing terminal. Handheld micro-movement captures fingers pressing matte black keys (#1A1A1A), clack-clack echoing sensory-sharp. Shallow DOF isolates key textures, screen glow airy high-key.

                    REPORTER
          (urgent whisper)
        We go live in ten.

Quick-cut to locked beauty frame: overhead flat-lay of keyboard, hands mid-keystroke, golden warmth in highlights.

INT. NEWSROOM CORRIDOR - CONTINUOUS - HANDHELD DYNAMIC

PRODUCER (40s, rumpled linen shirt, editorial energy) rushes in, clutching a single printed sheet. Close-up macro: fingers grip crisp paper edge, subtle texture crinkle under directional shadow. Footsteps punchy on polished floor.

                    PRODUCER
          (breathless, thrusting paper)
        Story just broke. Viral sensation --
        a breakthrough serum dropping tonight.
        Fresh from the lab: #E8F4E8 glow in a drop.
        We need this on air NOW.

Cut to eye-level: Producer slaps paper on desk. Reporter snatches it -- shallow DOF on hands unfolding, revealing bold headline: "REVOLUTIONARY SKIN DROP: EFFORTLESSLY COOL."

INT. NEWSROOM DESK - MOMENTS LATER - QUICK-CUT MONTAGE

Locked shot: Reporter scans lede, eyes widen. Macro detail: glossy ink on paper shimmers under on-camera flash punch. Handheld lifestyle: she smooths sheet like daily ritual, fingers tracing words.

                    REPORTER
          (to producer, electric)
        This is it. Tactile fresh. Sensory reset.
        Live in three... two...

Producer nods, backs away. Producer's hand lingers on chair -- real-life context, linen rumple.

INT. NEWSROOM - LIVE FEED PREP - HIGH-KEY AIRY

Overhead flat-lay: terminal screen pulses headline graphic -- clean whites, pink accents, light green glow (#E8F4E8). Reporter adjusts earpiece, golden hour warmth bathes face, natural skin tones pop true-to-life. Quick-cut macro: mic clip snaps tactile-close.

She straightens, cool poise. Red light blinks LIVE.

EXT. CITY SKYLINE THROUGH WINDOW - SIMULTANEOUS - WIDE LOCKED

Rain-slicked panes frame urban glow. Handheld pans subtle: distant billboards flicker product visuals -- curated minimal, screenshot-perfect.

INT. NEWSROOM ON AIR - LIVE - ENERGETIC PACING

Reporter leans into camera, dynamic handheld energy. Bright light, lifted shadows, slight highlight warmth. Every frame earns: punchy editorial.

                    REPORTER (V.O.)
          Breaking: The serum everyone's saving
          screenshots for. Fresh. Tactile. Yours
          in hours.

Screen splits: hero close-up serum dropper (imagined insert -- macro texture, airy light). Hands uncap, finger presses -- real context magic.

Final locked wide: Reporter's smile, screen fades to product flat-lay. Rain softens to mist.

                    REPORTER (O.S.)
          Effortlessly cool. Go get it.

FADE TO BLACK.

TITLE CARD: "DROP SOON"
(Glossier-esque minimal: #FFFFFF text on #F0E6D3 fade, pink period.)

END.
</USER_SCRIPT>

IMPORTANT: Extract EXACT original script text for each scene. Do NOT modify or enhance user's words.

For each character that appears:
1. Provide COMPLETE physical descriptions for visual consistency
2. Include clothing details that define the character
3. Add distinguishing features
4. Create a short consistency_tag for quick reference

For each unique location:
1. Provide COMPLETE visual descriptions for visual consistency
2. Include architectural style and design details
3. Identify key visual features that define the location
4. Specify the color palette and lighting setup
5. Create a short consistency_tag for quick reference

Respond with ONLY valid JSON matching the schema.
